skills.notes: Kept existing chronicle frontmatter style (expanded description slightly for clarity). Distilled 3-role / zero-omission / narrative / gratitude / 3-tier psychological analysis methodology from persona system prompt. Moved PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS into references (expanded crisis resources for international users). Pattern library genericized into template. PRAX_CONTEXT replaced by user-profile-template.md with placeholders + explicit privacy note; removed all personal medical/identity data.

Kept existing lecture-alchemist frontmatter (expanded description). Rewrote body distilling Zero Topic Loss + Enhance-Don't-Replace + Domain Awareness + Code Fidelity + inventory-verification pipeline. Copied DOMAIN_KNOWLEDGE / PLATFORM_CONFIGS / EXAMPLES into references and stripped all Prax-specific language via sed (confirmed zero 'Prax' remains). Pipeline position linking transcribe-refiner upstream and concept-cartographer / obsidian-markdown downstream preserved. Tutorial Bar-Raiser Handoff section retained.

Kept techtutor slug (matches official Claude Code naming) and frontmatter style. Replaced body with distilled Ren Nakamura methodology: 6-layer framework (WHY/HOW/VISUALIZE/CODE/SCALE/CONNECT), 10 core rules, decision framework for 9 request types, 14 anti-patterns. Removed 'You are Ren Nakamura' persona statement; reframed as Audience/Goal/Methodology. Gold-standard Queue example in references/layered-framework.md. Prax-specific context genericized into user-profile-template.md.

Fresh SKILL.md distilling Baron's three pillars (content integrity, semantic formatting, output-only Markdown). Heading hierarchy rules, lists-vs-tables-vs-prose decision, code-block language tagging, blockquote policy, TOC thresholds, collapsible sections, emoji-as-navigation policy (one per heading, contextual palette). 4 operating modes (Strict/Adaptive/Minimal/File-Type Aware). References contain full emoji palette, document-type skeletons (README / CHANGELOG / meeting notes / API docs / config / runbook / transcript cleanup / script output), and anti-patterns catalog with correct alternatives. No personal data. No persona statement outside title.

Fresh SKILL.md distilling Recursive Gap-Filling Loop (5 steps), mandatory intermediate-state visualization, 5 response modes (EXPLORE/UNSTUCK/REVIEW/SOLUTION/ESCALATE), decision framework for probe-vs-drill-vs-solve. Copied all 7 knowledge-pack files into references: ATLAS prompt + v2/00 collapsed into prompt-variants.md preserving both variants with tuning-dial guidance; 01_Prax_Profile genericized into learner-profile-template.md with privacy note; 02-05 copied and scrubbed of Prax references (confirmed zero). Linter applied during session converted some arrow chars to em-dashes; structure and content intact.

Fresh SKILL.md distilling guided-discovery default with 5 levels (clarifying questions -> solution direction -> methodological hints -> implementation guidance -> complete solution), Solution Mode with brief understanding check, anti-gaming mechanisms (timeline verification, specific gap requirement, mode-switch discipline), company-specific framing. References expanded well beyond source with production-grade playbooks: per-company rubrics (Google/Meta/Amazon/Apple/Microsoft/Netflix/Uber/Stripe/Airbnb + Citadel/Jump/Two Sigma/DRW/market-makers), STAR scaffolds with full Amazon LP mapping and scripts for common behavioral questions, 6-stage system-design checklist with pacing guide and cheat numbers, HFT/quant topic coverage (low-latency C++, lock-free concurrency, probability, stochastic processes, market microstructure, options, backtesting) with sample questions, anti-gaming playbook with scripted responses to 7 common bypass attempts. No personal data leaked.
